title: 403 Forbidden error when using npx with MCP
symptom: When executing an npx command to connect to the MCP server, a 403 Forbidden error is returned, indicating access issues.
applies_when: Using npx to connect to MCP server
not_this_if: Accessing a different server or endpoint
root_cause: The error occurs due to incorrect case sensitivity in the command line arguments. Specifically, using '--Header' instead of the correct '--header' leads to the server rejecting the request due to improper authorization formatting.
fix_steps: Ensure the authorization token is valid
agent_instruction: Correct the header case in your npx command and try again.
